recruiting_trials.title: Transdermal Compress Device for Transfemoral Amputations
recruiting_trials.description: Prospective, multicenter, single-arm, open-label study evaluating safety and effectiveness of the Transdermal Compress device in participants with transfemoral limb loss. Bone-anchored transdermal implant for patients who cannot use conventional socket prostheses. 5-year follow-up with Osseointegration Quality Registry.
key_outcomes: Composite endpoint: prosthetic wear time + PROMIS Physical Function + OPUS Satisfaction at 2 years
Infection rate (superficial and deep) at 2 and 5 years

recruiting_trials.title: MPK-K2: Microprocessor Knee for K2-Level Ambulators
recruiting_trials.description: Randomized controlled trial comparing microprocessor prosthetic knees to conventional knees for community ambulators (K-level 2). Evaluates functional outcomes, satisfaction, and mobility.

completed_trials.title: PROINGA: Satisfaction and Quality of Life Among Prosthetic Users in Gaza Governorate
completed_trials.description: Cross-sectional observational study of prosthetic satisfaction and quality of life among lower limb prosthetic users in Gaza. Examines relationship between device satisfaction and subjective well-being.

completed_trials.title: Early Abdominal Wall Prosthesis Infections: Epidemiology (AWPI)
completed_trials.description: Retrospective study on ~500 patients researching characteristics of prosthetic infections (microorganism, site, timing), factors linked to appearance, and optimization of management.
